LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. FOR GOOD CAUSE AND PURSUANT TO COUNSEL'S REPRESENTATION, THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND CONTINUES DEFENDANT BERT GABRIEL'S MOTION FOR ORDER QUASHING SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND VACATING DEFAULT - VOID JUDGMENT FOR LACK OF PERSONAL JURISDICTION OR SURPRISE TO JUNE 20, 2013 AT 9:30 AM. PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE A DECLARATION DELINEATING HIS FIRM'S BUSINESS PRACTICE RE: LOGGING AND RECEIVING MAIL. PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE THAT DECLARATON ON DEFENDANT AND PROVIDE NOTICE OF THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: RICHARD KRAMER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT BERT GABRIEL'S MOTION FOR ORDER QUASHING SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND VACATING DEFAULT -VOID JUDGMENT FOR LACK OF PERSONAL JURISDICTION OR SURPRISE - MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND VACATING DEFAULT IS OFF CALENDAR, BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S TWO SWORN DECLARATIONS FILED JUNE 11, 2013 THAT DEFENDANT GABRIEL HAS NOT SERVED A COPY OF THE MOVING PAPERS ON HIM AND REFUSED PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL'S VERBAL REQUEST FOR A COPY OF THE MOVING PAPERS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-24-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2013 Set For Trial On Mar-24-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Quashing Service Of Summons And Vacating Default -Void Judgent Forlack Of Personal Jurisdiction Or Surprise
Off Calendar Jun-20-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT BERT GABRIEL's Motion For Order Quashing Service Of Summons And Vacating Default -Void Judgment For lack Of Personal Jurisdiction Or Surprise - Motion to quash service of summons and vacating default is off calendar, based on Plaintiff's two sworn declarations filed June 11, 2013 that Defendant Gabriel has not served a copy of the moving papers on him and refused Plaintiff's counsel's verbal request for a copy of the moving papers. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Quashing Service Of Summons And Vacating Default -Void Judgent Forlack Of Personal Jurisdiction Or Surprise
Off Calendar May-22-2013 Continued To Jun-20-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Richard Gilbert, Esq. of Nelson & Kennard, Tel. 916.920.2295.x128, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was discussed. For good cause and pursuant to counsel's representation, the Court vacates its tentative ruling and continues DEFENDANT BERT GABRIEL's Motion For Order Quashing Service Of Summons And Vacating Default - Void Judgment For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction Or Surprise to June 20, 2013 at 9:30 am. Plaintiff shall file a declaration delineating his firm's business practice re: logging and receiving mail. Plaintiff shall serve that declaraton on defendant and provide notice of the new hearing date. Judge: Richard Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
